title: Why SAP API Policy v4 Quietly Made Clean Core the Most Important AI Decision of 2026
subtitle: A new SAP policy reads like developer governance. Read against the agentic AI shifts of the last eighteen months, it is something else.
summary: SAP API Policy v4/2026 makes Clean Core the prerequisite for enterprise agentic AI. A reading frame on Pull and Push, Model Context Protocol, and what the policy means for SAP customers, architects, and startups.
